The '''''Venithon Bandit''''' was the [[Ghtroc Industries/Legends|Ghtroc Industries]] [[580 freighter]] used by the pirate organization [[Venithon Twins]].

Originally owned by an [[Elomin/Legends|Elomin]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who had stolen it, the Venithon bought the ship. With the original documents conveniently "lost", they then registered the ''[[Venithon Bandit]]'' under both of their names, and during the following years, they refitted it with parts stolen to other, newer Ghtrocs; only the original hull was left, but it was the only ship the Venithon Twins ever had.
